# Test-determinism gate allowlist (grandfathered legacy debt).
# Format: relpath<TAB>rule<TAB>short reason
# A finding whose (path, rule) appears here is suppressed.
# Remove a line once the underlying test is determinized.
Packages/iOS/SupermuxMobileKit/Tests/SupermuxMobileKitTests/SupermuxMobileChangesStoreSyncTests.swift	assert-on-duration	static assertion on the configured sync RPC timeout, not a measured duration
cmuxTests/SupermuxMobileObserversTests.swift	sleep-then-assert	prove-silence test must outwait the 80 ms poke throttle window
cmuxTests/SupermuxMobileRunObserverTests.swift	sleep-then-assert	prove-silence test must outwait the 80 ms poke throttle window
